programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Houseboat; The Crew Builds a Spa
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it; Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Stop a Big Leak; Pups Save a Baby Anteater; Pups Save a Hatch Day; Pups Save the Munchie Mobile
programs.desc: The pups rescue Francois from a water tower geyser; the pups rescue a baby anteater stuck on a bucking RoboHorse; the pups rescue Ace and her special delivery for Chickaletta's party; the pups rescue Mr. Porter and his stranded food truck.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save the Wacky Water Skiers; Pups Save the Mayor's Assistant
programs.desc: When Emmy and Eddie take a joyride, Hurricane Harrigan and Cap'n Turbot get caught water-skiing behind the out-of-control boat.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: When the Krusty Krab is left filthy, a magical fish teaches SpongeBob how to keep surfaces looking spiffy, lickety-split; SpongeBob is recruited to cook in the big leagues, but first, he must prove his worth in the test kitchen.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown, Bubbletown; Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.
